body_txt: The character will often have to persuade the enemies of his authenticity by attacking one of his 'old' comrades or doing something else evil . Another frequent tactic is for the hero not to contact the enemies, but instead, just arrange for his life to fall apart — get fired from his job, start to drink, and so on — and wait for his enemies to contact him. Another possibility is to play the Trojan Prisoner and purposely get imprisoned only to pretend to be open to switch allegiance. The audience is usually told in advance that the character is doing this, but occasionally they are not. Often it is subject to a sort of Unspoken Plan Guarantee : if the audience knows, the enemies are more likely to know as well. Woe to the Fake Defector who trips a "The Villain Knows" Moment .
